overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving from an industrial warehouse district through urban highways and into the desert badlands. The journey transitions from covered industrial areas past smoking factory complexes, onto elevated highways with futuristic billboards, and finally through rocky desert terrain with massive pipeline structures.

events.description: exits industrial yard and enters open intersection with billboards visible

agents.ego_description: navigating through industrial area, making a left turn at intersection

notable_agents.action: person walking on sidewalk near the intersection

stacked red and blue metal shipping containers
yellow industrial crane structure with green support beams
large red digital billboard with green circular logo

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered industrial yard beneath highway overpasses, surrounded by shipping containers and warehouse buildings. The vehicle drives forward and makes a left turn at an intersection, revealing open sky and large digital billboards. Sparse pedestrian activity is visible near the crosswalk.

events.description: large industrial complex with smoking smokestacks becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: cruising along the industrial road, passing other vehicles and approaching the factory district

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: massive factory installation with multiple buildings and structures
tall industrial chimneys emitting thick black smoke
modern street lamp with orange accent on the pole

segments.scene_description: Driving along a straight industrial avenue with the massive factory complex dominating the horizon. Black smoke rises from tall smokestacks on the left. The road is lined with modern street lights and sparse vegetation. Other vehicles are visible ahead on the multi-lane road.

events.description: vehicle turns right onto highway ramp and begins ascending
merges onto elevated highway with desert landscape becoming visible

agents.ego_description: accelerating up the highway ramp and merging onto the elevated freeway

entered.detail: curved asphalt ramp leading up to the main highway
grey concrete safety barriers lining the highway edge
overhead directional highway signs with white arrows
tall digital billboard displaying WET DREAM advertisement with purple text

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns onto a highway ramp and ascends to the elevated freeway system. Concrete barriers line the road as the camera merges onto the main highway. Large digital billboards become prominent, and the landscape opens up to reveal desert terrain in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated desert highway with industrial ruins

events.description: passes large billboard and desert badlands become fully visible
drives past massive rusted pipeline structure arching over the highway

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on the elevated highway through the desert landscape

notable_agents.action: white car driving ahead on the highway

entered.detail: digital billboard displaying NICOLA advertisement with black and white imagery
massive rusted industrial pipeline with support structure crossing over the road
rocky desert hills and badlands terrain with sparse vegetation
abandoned industrial buildings and structures in the desert

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated highway through the desert badlands, passing massive digital billboards including one for WET DREAM and NICOLA. The landscape features rocky desert mountains, abandoned industrial ruins, and a massive rusted pipeline structure that arches over the highway. The environment is arid and open with clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway cutting through rocky terrain

events.description: passing under a highway overpass bridge

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed on the multi-lane highway through the rocky desert canyon

entered.detail: large red rock formation and cliff face alongside the highway
tall concrete barrier wall with graffiti on the right side of road
concrete highway overpass crossing above the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the highway cutting through a rocky desert canyon with steep red cliffs on the right side. The vehicle passes under concrete overpasses and alongside a tall concrete wall with graffiti. Traffic is moderate with several vehicles visible ahead, and the landscape is dominated by arid rocky terrain and distant mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a claustrophobic industrial yard into the vast, arid expanse of the desert badlands. It begins beneath highway overpasses among shipping containers and warehouses, moving through a left turn at an intersection that opens the view to digital billboards and a distant factory complex emitting black smoke. As the vehicle accelerates along a straight avenue, the camera ascends a highway ramp and merges onto an elevated freeway system where the urban density gives way to a wide-open horizon. The scene then shifts into the desert, passing massive advertisements for Wet Dream and Nicola beneath a rusted pipeline structure that arches over the road. Finally, the highway cuts through a rocky canyon with steep red cliffs and graffiti-covered walls, moving past other vehicles toward distant mountains under a clear sky.
